sections.paragraph:
κοινῶς adv. of κοινός (Eur. et al.) in the common language/dialect (Apollon. Dysc., Pron. 82, 27 al.) Mk 3:17 v.l.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 554
